episodes.title: The seal who inspired a doomsday cult (yes, really)
episodes.description:
You may not have heard of the names Tama-chan, Pana Wave, or Chino Shoho, but if you were living in Japan in the early 2000s then they definitely would have been familiar to you! In this weeks episode of the Animal Nerd Podcast I'm diving deep into what is honestly one of the wildest tales I've ever told on this show, and I could not be more excited to share this with you!
Show notes coming soon.
